title: Raman spectroscopy analysis code for label-free classification of breast cancer subtypes
author: Zhu, Zhiyu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This record contains the Raman spectral dataset and MATLAB analysis code supporting a study on breast cancer classification using Raman spectroscopy and machine learning. 
 
 The deposited dataset includes raw Raman spectra and corresponding class labels, including Normal, Invasive Ductal Carcinoma (IDC), Invasive Lobular Carcinoma (ILC), and Ductal Carcinoma in Situ (DCIS). 
 The deposited MATLAB analysis code consists of three files: main_code.mlx, pcalda_k.m, and pcasvm.m. The main script, main_code.mlx, contains the complete Raman spectral preprocessing workflow, including spectral range selection, smoothing, baseline correction, and normalization. It also calls two machine-learning functions for classification analysis. Specifically, pcalda_k.m performs PCA-based feature extraction followed by LDA classification, while pcasvm.m performs PCA-based feature extraction followed by SVM classification. To reproduce the analysis, users only need to run main_code.mlx, which automatically executes the preprocessing steps and calls the two classification functions. 
 
 The dataset and code are provided to support reproducibility of the results reported in the associated manuscript (DOI: https://doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-7714586/v1). The data have been anonymised and do not contain personally identifiable information.
